Discuss the process of deploying a deep learning model, specifically designed using Python, on the Amazon Web Services (AWS) platform. MODEL DEVELOPMENT REQUIRES DATA CLEANING. DEPLOYMENT INTEGRATION NEEDS API SETUP. * * *  
AWS EC2 INSTANCES SUPPORT MODEL INFERENCE. SECURITY MEASURES INCLUDE ENCRYPTION. MODEL PERFORMANCE DEPENDS ON INFERENCE TIME. * * *  
OVERFITTING AFFECTS MODEL ACCURACY. DATA SECURITY NEEDS ENCRYPTION. AWS S3 STORAGE ENHANCES DATA PROTECTION.
